ddls:
CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  "average_income" INTEGER /* Average income of residents in the borough */,
  "health_index" REAL /* Health index representing the overall health status */,
  "happiness_score" REAL /* Happiness score indicating the general well-being */,
  "education_level" REAL /* Education level as a percentage of the population with higher education */,
  "logo_link" TEXT /* Link to the borough's logo image */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the borough */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the borough in square kilometers */,
  "mayors_name" TEXT /* Name of the current mayor */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information for the borough authorities */,
  "website_link" TEXT /* Link to the official website of the borough */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "borough_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borough the statistic belongs to */,
  "statistic_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., average_income, health_index) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "year_recorded" INTEGER /* Year the statistic was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to collect the data */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or caveats */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_borough_statistics_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "residents_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borough the feedback is about */,
  "resident_name" TEXT /* Name of the resident providing feedback */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the resident providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date and time the feedback was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residents_feedback_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictive_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each predictive model */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borough the model is for */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model */,
  "prediction" TEXT /* Predicted outcome or trend */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictive_models_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
